title: Information Recovery under Deterministic Masking in Exponential Series Systems
description: For exponential series systems, we show that a deterministic masking mechanism that injectively maps each failure cause to a unique candidate set recovers the complete-identification Fisher information matrix, regardless of masking cardinality. Information loss from masking is a property of the masking mechanism, not the masking cardinality.

creators.name: Towell, Alexander
creators.affiliation: Cooperative Ph.D. Program in Computer Science, Southern Illinois University
